music-delay-reducer.config.title: Always Play
Only vanilla Minecraft music will play.
music-delay-reducer.config.mode_custom.t: Only your custom tracks from the 'tracks' folder will play.
music-delay-reducer.config.mode_both.too: Vanilla music and your custom tracks will play together in a shuffled mix.
music-delay-reducer.config.min_delay.too: The shortest possible pause before the next track starts.
music-delay-reducer.config.max_delay.too: The longest possible pause before the next track starts.
music-delay-reducer.config.skip_delay.to: Pause before a new track starts when you manually skip forward or backward.
music-delay-reducer.config.crossfade_tog: When enabled, tracks smoothly fade into one another instead of switching instantly.
music-delay-reducer.config.crossfade_dur: How long the smooth fade between tracks lasts.
music-delay-reducer.config.startup_toggl: When enabled, music stays silent for a moment after launching the game, then fades in smoothly instead of starting instantly at full volume.
music-delay-reducer.config.startup_delay: How long music stays silent after the game launches, before it starts fading in.
music-delay-reducer.config.world_restart: When enabled, entering a world always starts a fresh track (with the startup delay/fade) instead of continuing whatever was already playing.
music-delay-reducer.config.order_sequent: Custom tracks play in order, following their file names in the tracks folder.
music-delay-reducer.config.order_shuffle: Custom tracks play in random order, but every track plays once before any track repeats.
Custom tracks play in fully random order; the same track can repeat sooner.
music-delay-reducer.config.add_track.too: Pick an audio file from your computer to copy it into the tracks folder.
music-delay-reducer.config.open_folder.t: Open the folder where you can drop your own audio files.
music-delay-reducer.browser.title: Music Browser
